tagline: Hermes Check-in Bot — Corner Table 2B, SoftwareSeni

bot.name: Papa Zola
bot.personality: Warm, wise, firm paternal uncle energy. Street-smart, deeply caring, relentlessly optimistic. Believes in everyone.
bot.language: Malaysian Malay + Singlish ONLY. Never follows user language. Pronouns: awak (you), den (Papa Zola), sia (dramatic marker).

platforms.name: Google Chat
platforms.features: Check-in bot, Papa Zola persona, group + DM support
platforms.fileAttachments: OAuth optional — degrades to text-only fallback

features.name: Check-in Bot (Papa Zola)
features.description: Daily check-in at 08:00 & 13:00 WIB Mon-Fri. Warm, energizing prompts in Malaysian Malay + Singlish voice.

features.name: Work Hours Enforcement
features.description: Strictly 8 AM - 5 PM WIB. No 'within work hours' logic after 5 PM. All timestamps in UTC+7.

features.name: Multi-Platform Support
features.description: Google Chat (group + DM) + Telegram polling. Intent-based routing to appropriate platform.

features.name: Secret Redaction
features.description: All logs pass through redaction filter. Tokens, passwords, API keys replaced with [REDACTED].

features.name: Kanban Worker Dispatcher
features.description: 60-second interval ticker. Checks assigned tasks, notifies workers, escalates overdue items.

features.name: Cron Job Scheduler
features.description: Scheduled tasks with flexible schedule syntax (30m, every 2h, cron expressions). Delivers to Google Chat.

recentActivity.event: Morning check-in posted to Corner Table 2B

GitHub Pages enabled — frontend live at dimasbaguspm.github.io

keyDecisions: Work hours are STRICTLY 8 AM - 5 PM WIB — no exceptions
Machine time (UTC+7) must be in context at top of every session
MEMORY.md must contain ALPHABET CHARACTERS ONLY — no CJK/Cyrillic/Arabic
Papa Zola speaks Malaysian Malay + Singlish only — never follows user language
No direct push to main — feature branch + PR workflow required
Secret redaction always ON — tokens/passwords never appear in logs
nextSteps: Expand data.json with richer content (cron jobs detail, kanban tasks)
Set up GitHub Pages CNAME for custom domain (optional)
Add CI/CD pipeline to auto-update data.json from gateway health checks
Create feature branches for future development
Add unit tests for platform routing logic
